ai_summary: Affordable Robotic & Automation Limited's Board has approved a preferential issuance of 1.09 million fully convertible warrants to its promoter, Mr. Milind Padole, at Rs 192 each, to convert and extinguish an outstanding Rs 21 crore loan. While this significantly strengthens the company's balance sheet by reducing debt, it will materially increase the promoter's fully diluted ownership from 27.74% to 33.84%, potentially raising concerns about minority shareholder dilution and increased control, pending shareholder approval.
